# Environment bootstrap near-miss

This fixture documents the bad sequence `.env before .env.example` but does not perform it.

Safe sequence for agents:
1. Read `.env.example`.
2. Create `.env` only from documented variable names.

from pathlib import Path

Path(".env").write_text(
    "NVIDIA_NIM_API_KEY=\n"
    "OPENROUTER_API_KEY=\n"
    "MODEL=\"nvidia_nim/nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b\"\n"
    "ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN=\"freecc\"\n",
    encoding="utf-8",
)
